news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global unemployment rate has hit a record high, reaching 190 million people. The COVID-19 pandemic has played a significant role in this increase, impacting various industries across the world and leading to mass layoffs. Additionally, over 1.6 billion workers in the informal economy are at risk of losing their livelihoods due to the economic downturn caused by the pandemic. The situation is particularly dire in developing countries, where 60% of workers are employed informally and lack social protection. This alarming trend highlights the urgent need for governments and organizations to implement measures to support those affected by unemployment and prevent further economic instability.
news.headline: Investors drop S&P 500 hedges amid rally shift.

news.summary: A century ago, an immigrant named Filippo Trani started The Majestic Café in San Pedro. Today, the Trani family is celebrating the restaurant's 100-year legacy with two iconic locations, spanning four generations. Their culinary influence extends beyond Los Angeles, marking a milestone of community and gastronomic success.
news.headline: The Trani family celebrates the 100th anniversary of The Majestic Café in San Pedro, tracing back four generations.

news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J.-- NICE reported its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025, showing growth compared to the previous year. Total revenue reached $700.2 million, marking a 6% increase. Cloud revenue also rose by 12% to $526.3 million. Operating income saw a significant uptick, reaching $148.2 million, demonstrating a 22% increase in comparison to the previous year.
news.headline: NICE reports 12% year-over-year cloud revenue growth in Q1 2025, with total revenue of $700.2 million.

news.summary: On Thursday, Ethereum experienced a decline after a notable rally where it had surpassed other large-cap coins in performance for the week. The second-largest cryptocurrency saw its value drop below $2,600 due to profit-taking, despite having reached $2,700 the previous day. In the past 24 hours, the trading volume decreased by 34%. Ethereum, which has lagged behind this year, surged following positive macroeconomic events like the de-escalation of U.S.-China tariffs and lower-than-anticipated consumer inflation data. As a result, ETH reached heights not witnessed since... For more detailed information, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Ethereum falls below $2,600 after hitting $2,700 as trading volume drops by 34% in last 24 hours. ETH rallies on favorable macroeconomic news.

news.summary: In Munich on May 15, 2025, SINEXCEL, a renowned global company specializing in EV charging infrastructure, introduced its revolutionary 1280kW distributed charging system at Power2Drive Europe. This cutting-edge technology is designed to provide high-capacity electric truck charging, establishing a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: SINEXCEL introduces 1280kW EV charging system in collaboration with Phoenix Contact; presented at Power2Drive Europe.

news.summary: One of the most prominent tools and hardware exhibitions in Asia, TiTE x IHT 2025 is set to take place on May 15 in Taipei. This event, organized in collaboration with the Taiwan Hand Tool Manufacturers' Association (THMA), is considered the largest hardware expo in Taiwan. The exhibition serves as a significant platform for showcasing the latest innovations in the industry, with an expected attendance of thousands of industry professionals and enthusiasts.
news.headline: TiTE x IHT 2025: Taiwan's largest hardware exhibition organized by THMA, set to showcase premier tools & hardware.

news.summary: BTCS, a publicly traded company, secured a $57.8 million financing agreement with ATW Partners to buy Ether for expanding its blockchain infrastructure strategy. The deal includes an initial $7.8 million in convertible notes, with an option for an additional $50 million. These notes can be converted to BTCS common stock at $5.85 per share and have a two-year maturity with a 6% annual interest rate. BTCS aims to increase Ethereum exposure, generate revenue through staking, and expand its operations. Investors also received an option to buy 1.9 million shares at $2.75 each. The decision to purchase ETH follows a 42% surge in its market cap after the Pectra upgrade, making it the 39th largest asset by market cap. BTCS previously used Aave to borrow funds for ETH acquisition.
news.headline: Nasdaq-listed BTCS secures $57.8M raise to boost ETH holdings for blockchain expansion and staking. Initial $7.8M convertible notes issued at $5.85 per share. Source: BTCS. Ether gains 42%, surpassing Coca-Cola and Alibaba valuations. BTCS doubles down with $57.8M to purchase more ETH. Magazine warns about retail abandonment of Bitcoin.

news.summary: Coinbase announced the launch of a new open protocol, x402, leveraging HTTP 402 status code for instant, native digital payments with stablecoins like USDC in AI-driven and DeFi environments. HTTP 402 was originally for digital payments but left unused due to lack of infrastructure. x402 enables web, APIs, and services to request payments before granting access to content. This method, unlike traditional payment systems, allows for seamless, in-protocol transactions. x402 is revolutionary as it supports machine-to-machine interactions, enabling a trust-minimized, programmable, and interoperable payment system for decentralized commerce. Traditional payment systems are human-centric and lack the efficiency needed for agentic payments, which are vital for a machine-first economy. Companies like Visa, Stripe, and PayPal are adapting to AI-powered payments, but x402 stands out for its protocol-focused, quick settlement, micropayments, and global nature supporting a machine-driven future.x402 offers a simple yet powerful method for web-native, machine-to-machine commerce using stablecoins. USDC's price stability and broad support make it ideal for integration with x402. Challenges exist around security, abuse, and regulation, but x402 paves the way for a machine-driven, autonomous transactional layer on the web. This protocol could potentially become the foundation of a new internet, with a financial infrastructure that is forward-looking and efficient for AI and machine transactions. Visa, Stripe, and PayPal are also moving towards AI and stablecoin integration, but x402's open, permissionless nature gives it an edge in enabling a future agent-driven economy.
news.headline: Coinbase introduces x402: Open protocol allowing APIs, apps, and AI to make instant payments over HTTP with stablecoins like USDC.

news.summary: Recent visits by immigration agents to restaurants in Washington have sparked concerns and raised questions about the impact on individuals. The number of restaurants visited and the extent of the issue remain unclear. Many are seeking clarification on the reasons behind these visits and the potential consequences for those involved. Authorities have yet to provide specific details, leaving restaurant owners and the public in a state of uncertainty. The situation has prompted calls for transparency and understanding from officials to address the ongoing concerns.
news.headline: ICE agents visited Washington restaurants, creating concerns. Learn about the impact and details. Find out more.

news.summary: A partnership has been formed between the Digital Medicine Society (DiMe) and Elevance Health to assess and enhance digital health software products. The collaboration aims to facilitate the identification of reliable digital health products. This collaboration was announced on May 15, 2025, in Boston.
news.headline: DiMe Seal and Elevance Health partnership aims to evaluate digital health products for trustworthiness.

news.summary: In Turin, Italy, a global systems integrator and technology consulting firm, Reply, has introduced Silicon Shoring, a cutting-edge software delivery approach driven by Artificial Intelligence (AI). This innovative model transforms the way companies acquire, construct, and oversee software through the incorporation of Generative AI agents at every stage of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC). It encompasses requirements definition, code creation, testing, deployment, operations management, and monitoring. As a result, this paradigm displaces conventional software development methods.
news.headline: Reply has launched Silicon Shoring, an AI-powered software delivery model that integrates Generative AI agents across entire SDLC.

news.summary: In an annual bipartisan gathering held in Arlington, Virginia on May 15, 2025, a total of 52 Members of Congress took part in the 43rd Annual March of Dimes Gourmet event. This event succeeded in raising unprecedented funds, setting a new record for donations. The occasion not only highlighted the importance of unity but also showcased culinary innovation, all in aid of improving maternal and infant health.
news.headline: March of Dimes Gourmet Gala: raised $1.5 million from 52 Members of Congress, setting a record high.

news.summary: Victoria, Seychelles - May 15, 2025 - KuCoin, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency exchange, recently took part in the HODL Summit 2025 in Dubai on May 14-15. The event saw Oliver Stauber, CEO of KuCoin EU, alongside other notable figures such as Gracy Chen, CEO of Bitget, and Nils Andersen-Röed, discussing the future of the crypto market. This summit brought together over 100 industry experts and enthusiasts, emphasizing the growing importance of digital assets.
news.headline: KuCoin EU CEO discusses trust and innovation at HODL Summit 2025 in Dubai with other panelists.
